SEARCH
Package model.events

Class Event

java.lang.Object
model.events.Event
Direct Known Subclasses:
Concert, Special, Sport
public abstract class Event extends Object
Abstract base class representing a generic event in the TicketMiner system. Stores pricing, ticket sales, and scheduling information.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Event()
    Constructs a default Event with no initial field values.
    Event(int eventID, String type, String name, String date, String time, double vipPrice, double goldPrice, double silverPrice, double bronzePrice, double generalAdmissionPrice)
    Constructs an Event with the specified scheduling and pricing details.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    double
    getBronzePrice()
    Returns the price for a Bronze ticket to this event.
    String
    getDate()
    Returns the scheduled date of this event.
    int
    getEventID()
    Returns the unique identifier for this event.
    String
    getEventName()
    Returns the name of this event.
    double
    getGeneralAdmissionPrice()
    Returns the price for a General Admission ticket to this event.
    double
    getGoldPrice()
    Returns the price for a Gold ticket to this event.
    double
    getSilverPrice()
    Returns the price for a Silver ticket to this event.
    String
    getTime()
    Returns the scheduled time of this event.
    String
    getType()
    Returns the type of this event (e.g., Sport, Concert, Special).
    double
    getVipPrice()
    Returns the price for a VIP ticket to this event.
    void
    setDate(String date)
    Sets the scheduled date of this event.
    void
    setEventID(int eventID)
    Sets the unique identifier for this event.
    void

    Sets the name of this event.
    void
    setTime(String time)
    Sets the scheduled time of this event.
    void
    setType(String type)
    Sets the type of this event.
    String
    toString()
    Returns a formatted string representation of this event including ID, name, date, and all ticket prices.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Event

      public Event()
      Constructs a default Event with no initial field values.

    • Event

      public Event(int eventID, String type, String name, String date, String time, double vipPrice, double goldPrice, double silverPrice, double bronzePrice, double generalAdmissionPrice)
      Constructs an Event with the specified scheduling and pricing details.
      Parameters:
      eventID - the unique numeric identifier for the event
      type - the event type (e.g., Sport, Concert, Special)
      name - the name of the event
      date - the scheduled date of the event (MM/DD/YYYY format)
      time - the scheduled time of the event (hh:mm AM/PM format)
      vipPrice - the price for a VIP ticket
      goldPrice - the price for a Gold ticket
      silverPrice - the price for a Silver ticket
      bronzePrice - the price for a Bronze ticket
      generalAdmissionPrice - the price for a General Admission ticket

  • Method Details

    • getEventID

      public int getEventID()
      Returns the unique identifier for this event.
      Returns:
      the event ID

    • setEventID

      public void setEventID(int eventID)
      Sets the unique identifier for this event.
      Parameters:
      eventID - the new event ID

    • getType

      public String getType()
      Returns the type of this event (e.g., Sport, Concert, Special).
      Returns:
      the event type string

    • setType

      public void setType(String type)
      Sets the type of this event.
      Parameters:
      type - the new event type string

    • getEventName

      public String getEventName()
      Returns the name of this event.
      Returns:
      the event name

    • setEventName

      public void setEventName(String name)
      Sets the name of this event.
      Parameters:
      name - the new event name

    • getDate

      public String getDate()
      Returns the scheduled date of this event.
      Returns:
      the date string in MM/DD/YYYY format

    • setDate

      public void setDate(String date)
      Sets the scheduled date of this event.
      Parameters:
      date - the new date string in MM/DD/YYYY format

    • getTime

      public String getTime()
      Returns the scheduled time of this event.
      Returns:
      the time string in hh:mm AM/PM format

    • setTime

      public void setTime(String time)
      Sets the scheduled time of this event.
      Parameters:
      time - the new time string in hh:mm AM/PM format

    • getVipPrice

      public double getVipPrice()
      Returns the price for a VIP ticket to this event.
      Returns:
      the VIP ticket price

    • getGoldPrice

      public double getGoldPrice()
      Returns the price for a Gold ticket to this event.
      Returns:
      the Gold ticket price

    • getSilverPrice

      public double getSilverPrice()
      Returns the price for a Silver ticket to this event.
      Returns:
      the Silver ticket price

      Returns the price for a Bronze ticket to this event.
      Returns:

      Returns the price for a General Admission ticket to this event.
      Returns:

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a formatted string representation of this event including ID, name, date, and all ticket prices.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a human-readable summary of the event
